title: Log Google Calendar Event in Monday Activity as meeting
excerpt:

posts.author: mhoskins (Michael Hoskins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Today Gmail Emails automatically generate an activity log to the Contact and Account if they are sent from Gmail.
I would like the ability for monday to also automatically generate a meeting activity log for Google Calendar invites that are sent out to contacts. This prevents my team from doing double the work to show activity.
